title: Homikit Loaf Tin Set of 2, Stainless Steel Cake Tins Bread Moulds for Baking, Rectangular Oven Baking Pan Bakeware Set - Meatloaf, Toast Bread, Pie, Lasagna, Healthy & Non-Toxic & Sturdy
features: FOOD GRADE STAINLESS STEEL: Homikit loaf tins are made of high quality stainless steel, Be assured that No harmful chemicals will transfer or flake into your cooking foods, Healthy and reliable to bake delicious treats for your family, Far superior to Teflon coatings bread tin

HEAVY-DUTY CONSTRUCTION: High hardness materials that spreads heat evenly to make cakes swell well and keep their fluffy, Sturdy and highly resistant to deformation or bending, More reliable than those flimsy silicone or ceramic baking tins, A useful addition to your cookware

WELL MADE ONE PIECE MOLD: These loaf cooking containers feature a seamless design and with perfect 6.5cm deep side that give your baked goods a lovely formed version, No joints or dead corners to ruin your loaves, Sleek rolled rims without sharp spots for comfortable grip

EASY CLEANING & STORING: Smooth matte finished surface always stay shiny and release your foods effortlessly, Cleaning is a doddle and dishwasher friendly to save your labor, Can be used for storing ice creams, meat loaves and pâtés in freezer/fridge, Ready for any buffet or party

GREAT VALUE 2 PIECES: Measures 23.5 x 12.5 x 6.5cm, Stackable design for space-saving storage, Set of 2 let you bake homemade banana loaf, ginger loaf, fruit cake, sour dough bread, rye bread, nut roast, cheesecake at a time; Also cooking lasagna or pies, heating serving roasting prepping - Covered all your needs
description: If you are looking for a multifunctional and healthy loaf cake tin, then look no further! Homikit Loaf & Bread Tins Set of 2, is made out of food-safe stainless steel, No toxic materials to affect the taste of your baking items, Hygienic and safe to hold up regular uses. Friendly rounded edges without rough corners comfy to grasp, High heat transfer efficiency help you enjoy flawless golden-brown sweets every time. These sturdy piece of baking equipment will be your go-to in the kitchen and never let you down. Why Choose Our Reusable Loaf & Bread Baking Pan Set? Silicone version feel floppy and would release awful tastes, while Teflon one will run the risk of flaking harmful coatings into your baking. However, Our Stainless Steel Oven Baking Tray have the following advantages, Trust us, you won’t go back to others after this! Premium grade stainless steel without toxic materials, 100% safe for your health Heavy-gauge metal steel, Solid and unbreakable, Serviceable and built to last Bright brushed finished surface, Parchment paper for less-sticky and easier clean Well finished rolled edges designed for ease of use, No seams for food get stuck in Suitable for a wide range of appliances: Freezer, Fridge, Oven, Toaster and Dishwasher Also can be professional used at bakery or café, A terrific gift for your friends or housewarming, Christmas Great for preparing or DIY all types of tasteful low carb bread, Madeira loaf, sponge cake, bread pudding, quiche, pot pies, pancakes, flapjacks or pizzas Dimension: Outer Size: 23.5 x 12.5cm Inner Size: 22.6 x 11.5cm Bottom: 22 x 11cm Height: 6.5cm SWEET TIPS 1. Please use hot water, mild soap and gentle sponge to clean these bakeware for the beauty of their surface. 2. Please clean and dry them after using for their durability, Stored in dry place.
